title: lasiandra benthamiana
intro: Lasiandra benthamiana, also known as the Lasiantha plant, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation. The plant is often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures. Additionally, the plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing.
